Trump’s speech was a pathetic act of desperation. He’s flailing over his war in Iran, costs are sky rocketing, millions are losing their health insurance and his poll numbers are tanking. He’s failing and afraid of a new majority investigating his criminal corruption.
Trump says the only excuses for voting by mail should be "illness, disability, or military service."  Which one is he claiming when he votes by mail? We know its not military service!
Remember when he said during his campaign, “I’ll be a dictator on day one”?
Can Trump explain how all this supposed illegal voting resulted in Republicans winning the Presidency, Senate, and House?
Instead of focusing on ending the war and lowering costs, he’s spewing conspiracies and unproven accusations to set the stage for his attempt to deny the midterm elections.
I wonder how long it will take the FCC to investigate the networks that refused to air his speech.
